description_long: This is a striking blue convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and aggressive styling. The car features a two-seat open cockpit, black accents on the hood, side mirrors, and rear spoiler, and prominent air intakes along the sides. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, with red brake calipers visible through the rims. The rear of the car showcases a bold diffuser, dual exhausts, and a distinctive engine cover, hinting at high performance. The interior appears to be finished in black, with sculpted racing seats and a minimalist dashboard. The overall design is reminiscent of high-end Italian supercars, emphasizing speed, luxury, and exclusivity.
description: A blue, high-performance convertible sports car with black accents, red brake calipers, and a sleek, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive nose, angular headlights, and open cockpit with two racing seats.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the car's low stance, sculpted bodywork, large wheels, and visible red brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bold diffuser, dual exhausts, rear spoiler, and engine cover details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the aerodynamic lines and convertible roof mechanism.
